task_description: Batch 3 features for CareVista: Offline Mode Support, Resident Tablet Interface, QR Room Scanning, Benchmarking Dashboard, Board Pack Generator, Staff Performance Insights, Built-in e-Learning Module, Competency Sign-off Workflow, Diabetes Management Module, and Palliative Care Pathway. Full backend APIs (migrations, controllers, routes) and frontend pages integrated into existing navigation.

verification.summary: Both frontend and backend builds pass. Backend has 0 new TS errors (only pre-existing errors in auth.controller.ts, photos.controller.ts, index.ts, upload.ts). Frontend build succeeds with only pre-existing type warnings in CareNotes, Emar, Incidents, Training pages. All 10 new pages, controllers, routes, and migration are in place.
